commit.message:
Initial commit: AI Book Reader web app

Full-stack Next.js app for AI-powered book reading with:
- PDF/EPUB upload and client-side parsing
- Dual-panel reader (original text + AI interpretation)
- OpenRouter API integration with streaming
- Provider-filtered model selector (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, DeepSeek, Mistral)
- Draggable split panel divider
- IndexedDB persistence via Dexie.js
- Dark mode, mobile responsive layout
- Customizable typography and AI prompts

Add project README with setup instructions and architecture overview

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: persist session results to disk for retrieval after agent stop (#105)

When a klaus agent stops (budget exhaustion, error, or explicit stop),
session results are now persisted to .klaus/last-result.json in the
workspace directory. The status and result MCP tools fall back to the
persisted result when in-memory state is empty, allowing orchestrators
to retrieve results even after container restarts.

Closes #61

Switch from SQLite to Neon PostgreSQL for Vercel deployment

- Build script now runs prisma db push to sync schema on deploy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(history): hiển thị công thức tính điểm minh bạch trong lịch sử trận

Mỗi trận trong Lịch Sử giờ có dòng breakdown:
- Rating trước trận của từng đội (team1PtsBefore / team2PtsBefore)
- Chênh lệch rating (Δrating)
- Công thức áp dụng:
  · Tỉ số bằng nhau → N pts (không nhân/chia)
  · Đội mạnh thắng  → baseDelta ÷ divisor = result pts
  · Đội yếu thắng   → baseDelta × divisor = result pts

Giúp người chơi hiểu rõ tại sao cộng/trừ chính xác số điểm đó.

commit.message:
feat: セキュリティヘッダーと auth/jquants レート制限を導入 (#161)

* feat: セキュリティヘッダーと auth/jquants レート制限を導入

- governor クレートを追加（トークンバケット方式レート制限）
- add_security_headers ミドルウェアで全レスポンスに付与
  X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  X-Frame-Options: DENY
  Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
- build_rate_limiter/rate_limit ミドルウェアを middleware.rs に追加
- auth/jquants ルートにレート制限層を適用（デフォルト 10/5 rps）
- 環境変数 AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_RPS / JQUANTS_RATE_LIMIT_RPS で閾値を変更可能
- ユニットテスト 5 件追加（ヘッダー付与・レート制限通過・429 返却）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: セキュリティヘッダー層を最外側に移動し 403/413 も対象に

- add_security_headers を cors の外側（最外層）に配置することで
  validate_origin の 403・body limit の 413 にもヘッダーが付くよう修正
- 不正オリジン 403 でもセキュリティヘッダーが付くことを確認する回帰テスト追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: auth ルートを IP 単位の keyed レート制限に変更し DoS バイパスを防止

- build_keyed_rate_limiter / keyed_rate_limit を追加（DefaultKeyedRateLimiter<IpAddr>）
- extract_client_ip で fly-client-ip / x-forwarded-for から実クライアント IP を取得
- auth_routes を global limiter から keyed limiter に切り替え
  （jquants は外部 API クォータ保護のため引き続き global）
- keyed rate limit 関連テスト 4 件追加（通過/同一IP拒否/異IP独立）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: X-Forwarded-For を削除し fly-client-ip のみ信頼・retain_recent で定期メモリ解放

- extract_client_ip を fly-client-ip 専用に変更（X-Forwarded-For はクライアント偽装可能なため削除）
  fly-client-ip が無い場合は 0.0.0.0 フォールバック（共有バケットで保守的制限）
- app_router で auth_limiter に対し 60 秒間隔の retain_recent() タスクを spawn し
  IP スプレー時のメモリ増加を抑制
- テストのヘッダーを x-forwarded-for → fly-client-ip に更新

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: cargo fmt 修正・auth/jquants の 429 回帰テスト追加

- cargo fmt で routes.rs のインデントを整形
- auth_routes と jquants_routes が rps=1 を超えると 429 を返す統合テストを追加
- routes::tests に make_test_state ヘルパーを追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(B): admin dashboard + auth token

- requireAdmin middleware: controlla Authorization Bearer o ?token=
- ADMIN_TOKEN env var (commento in .env, vuoto di default)
- GET /admin → serve frontend/admin.html
- GET /api/admin/stats → conteggi DB (conversations, messages, doc_chunks, components)
- GET /api/admin/conversations → lista con msg_count
- DELETE /api/admin/conversations/:id → elimina con cascata
- frontend/admin.html: dashboard self-contained con stats card + tabella conversazioni

commit.message:
Initial commit: Naver blog auto-posting web app

- Spring Boot 3.x backend with MyBatis + MySQL
- React + Vite frontend with TipTap editor
- Claude API integration for AI blog content generation

commit.message:
Complete BoundaryMergeGPU: Lanczos eigensolver + OptimizedHeff

MAJOR IMPLEMENTATION:
1. Lanczos Eigensolver
   - Iterative Krylov subspace builder
   - Tridiagonal eigenvalue problem
   - Rayleigh quotient for ground state energy
   - Convergence checking with tolerance

2. OptimizedHeff Integration
   - Dynamic creation based on dimensions
   - Uses Phase 1 OptimizedHeff for H_eff application
   - Proper hipTensor handle management

3. S Scaling Kernel
   - kernel_scale_rows: Scale matrix rows by vector
   - Forms A_right = S @ Vh correctly
   - Used in split_with_svd for proper SVD result formation

ALGORITHM COMPLETE:
✅ Step 1: Form theta from psi_left . diag(V) . psi_right
✅ Step 2: Optimize with Lanczos (NOW IMPLEMENTED)
✅ Step 3: Split with exact SVD
✅ Step 4: Compute V = 1/S

All placeholders removed. BoundaryMergeGPU is now production-ready!

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add WebGL post-processing layer (bloom, CRT scanlines, chromatic aberration, vignette, colour grade)

- New js/webgl.js: WebGLFX module uploads Canvas 2D as texture each frame and runs a
  3-pass shader pipeline (bloom extract → half-res Gaussian blur → composite)
- Composite pass applies chromatic aberration, CRT scanlines, vignette, and warm colour grade
- Falls back to plain Canvas 2D display if WebGL is unavailable
- index.html: load webgl.js before game.js
- game.js: call WebGLFX.init() at startup and WebGLFX.render() each frame

commit.message:
Dev (#88)

* ci: deploy staging on main push via central dispatch (#71)

* feat(US-IA-004): Implement activity recommendations service (#73)

- Added new activity recommendation features including vectorization, hybrid scoring, and personalized recommendations based on user context.
- Introduced API endpoints for fetching activity recommendations, tracking user interactions, and checking service health.
- Updated README to reflect new services and their functionalities.
- Enhanced architecture with dedicated services and types for activities and accommodations.

Related tests added for unit verification.

* feat(flights): Implement flight recommendation system (US-IA-004-bis) (#74)

Complete implementation of personalized flight recommendations:

Services (IA-004-bis.1 & IA-004-bis.2):
- FlightVectorizerService: 8D vectorization (972 lines)
- FlightScoringService: Multi-factor scoring (673 lines)
- FlightRecommendationService: Orchestrator (546 lines)

Types & Configuration:
- flight-vector.types.ts: Complete type system (600+ lines)
- Flight classes, types, alliances
- Segment-specific cabin class boosts
- Default configs and cache keys

API Endpoints (IA-004-bis.3):
- GET /flights: Personalized recommendations
- POST /flights/interactions: Interaction tracking
- GET /flights/status: Health check

Documentation:
- Complete README section with architecture, examples
- Performance targets and scoring algorithm
- 20+ query parameters supported

Architecture:
- 8D vectors compatible with UserVector
- Scoring: 45% similarity + 25% popularity + 20% quality + 10% context
- Segment boosts for cabin classes (0.3-1.4x)
- MMR diversification (60% relevance, 40% diversity)
- Redis cache (30min TTL)

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* adapt ports with docs

* feat(flights): Enhance flight recommendation service with user preferences and favorites

- Updated fetchUserPreferences to retrieve user favorites and preferences alongside the user vector and segment.
- Enriched flight search filters with user preferences, including preferred airlines and budget constraints.
- Adjusted scoring to incorporate favorite destinations and preferred airlines for improved recommendations.
- Updated step comments in the recommendation process for clarity and accuracy.
- Enhanced response metadata to include details about favorites used in recommendations.

* feat(flights): Refactor flight recommendation service and enhance data types

- Introduced a FavoriteItem type for better type safety in processing user favorites.
- Updated filtering and mapping of favorites in the FlightRecommendationService to use the new FavoriteItem type.
- Added favoriteDestinations and preferredAirlines fields to the TripContext interface for enriched user data.
- Enhanced FlightRecommendationResponse metadata to include counts of favorites used in recommendations.

* fix(itinerary_middleware): error_503_middleware_auth (#77)

* feat(context): Add context analysis routes and configuration (#79)

- Introduced new context routes for API under '/api/v1/context'.
- Added optional OpenWeather configuration to environment settings for enhanced contextual data retrieval.

* fix(ai): switch production image to tsx runtime

* feat(kafka): Add recommendation interaction event tracking (#81)

- Implemented the `publishRecommendationInteracted` method in `KafkaService` to publish events when users interact with recommendations.
- Updated `RecommendationService` to track user interactions and publish corresponding Kafka events.
- Defined new `AIRecommendationInteractedPayload` type for structured interaction data.
- Added `AI_RECOMMENDATION_INTERACTED` topic to Kafka configuration.

This change enhances user interaction tracking for recommendations, allowing for better analytics and user experience improvements.

* fix(DR-573): fix hotel search always returning same hotel (#83)

* fix(DR-573): add cityCode to Amadeus hotel-offers search params

The cityCode parameter was missing from the searchParams object sent to
/v3/shopping/hotel-offers, causing every hotel search to fail and fall
back to a static hotel list (or hardcoded frontend fallback), making it
appear as if the same hotel was always returned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(DR-573): implement two-step hotel search (by-city → hotel-offers)

The Amadeus /v3/shopping/hotel-offers endpoint requires hotelIds, not
cityCode. Added a two-step flow:
1. GET /v1/reference-data/locations/hotels/by-city to resolve hotel IDs
2. GET /v3/shopping/hotel-offers with those IDs to get real prices,
   room details and availability

Previously only step 1 was done (fallback), leaving prices/images empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(DR-446): Notifications In-App (#84)

* feat(DR-446): implement in-app notification system with Socket.io

- Add Notification model and NotificationType enum to Prisma schema
- Add NOTIFICATION_INAPP_CREATED Kafka topic and payload type
- Add SocketService singleton to manage Socket.io instance
- Add NotificationService with CRUD operations (get/count/markAsRead/markAllAsRead/create)
- Add notificationRoutes: GET /notifications, PATCH /mark-all-read, PATCH /:id/read
- Integrate Socket.io into user-service HTTP server with JWT auth middleware
- Publish Kafka events non-blocking on notification creation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(notifications): wire payment events to in-app notifications (DR-446)

Subscribe to PAYMENT_COMPLETED and PAYMENT_FAILED Kafka events in
user-service startup. Creates in-app notifications (PAYMENT_RECEIVED /
PAYMENT_FAILED type) with Socket.io push to the user.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(notifications): add direct notification on booking confirm (DR-446)

Add POST /internal endpoint on user-service for service-to-service
notification creation. Voyage-service now calls it when a booking is
confirmed via the /confirm endpoint, bypassing the need for Stripe
webhooks + Kafka in the notification chain.

Flow: Frontend → voyage /confirm → user-service /internal → DB + Socket.io

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Feature/dr 447 notification preferences (#86)

* feat(DR-447): add notification preferences API and preference-aware sending

- Add notificationPreferences Json field to UserSettings schema
- Add REFUND_PROCESSED, PROMO_OFFER, PLATFORM_UPDATE, ACCOUNT_SECURITY to NotificationType enum
- Create GET/PUT /api/v1/users/notification-preferences endpoints with validation
- Add shouldSend() check in NotificationService before in-app and email delivery
- Publish notification.email.requested Kafka event only when email channel is enabled
- Always-on types (ACCOUNT_SECURITY, SYSTEM, PRICE_ALERT, TRIP_REMINDER) bypass preferences

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(user): fix Socket.io userId extraction from JWT payload (DR-447)

JWT payload uses "userId" not "id", causing socket to join room
"user:undefined" and preventing real-time notification delivery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Dr 414 us ia 007 création et préparation du dataset d entraînement (#87)

* Add DREAMSCAPE ML ETL pipeline

Introduce a new ai/ ML dataset pipeline: adds environment example, Dockerfile, data .gitignore, a comprehensive README and a full ETL package. New modules include config (dataset, db, logging), ETL steps (extract_user_data, extract_recommendations, extract_voyage_data, merge, feature_engineering, data_cleaning, label_construction, negative_sampling, gdpr_anonymization, export_dataset), utilities (db_connector, logger, metrics, validators), scripts to run the pipeline, and requirements. The export module produces train/test Parquet files, metadata and an HTML quality report; logging and DB configuration are wired via env vars and dotenv. This provides the foundation to extract, transform, clean, anonymize and export training datasets for the recommendation model, and includes a Docker image for reproducible execution.

* feat(ml): implement ML training dataset pipeline (US-IA-007)

Implement complete ETL pipeline for ML training dataset creation

Features:
- 10-step ETL pipeline: extract → merge → feature engineering → labels →
  negative sampling → cleaning → anonymization → export
- Realistic seed data: 100 users, 50 destinations, ~1760 recommendations
- Train/test split (80/20) with stratification on engagement_score
- 77 ML-ready features including 8D user/item vectors
- GDPR-compliant anonymization (PII removal, k-anonymity)
- Parquet output with snappy compression
- Quality reports (HTML) and metadata (JSON)

Dataset validation:
- Created validate_dataset.py with 10 coherence tests
- All tests passing: no missing values, valid ranges, label coherence
- Realistic distribution: 60% not_viewed, 27% viewed, 9% clicked, 5% booked

Bug fixes:
- Fixed boolean column imputation (travelWithChildren)
- Dropped problematic array columns (climatePreferences, riskTolerance)
- Fixed Docker volume paths (relative → absolute /app/data/)
- Fixed merge_datasets default paths

Files modified:
- dreamscape-services/ai/ml/etl/data_cleaning.py
- dreamscape-services/ai/ml/etl/export_dataset.py
- dreamscape-services/ai/ml/etl/merge_datasets.py
- dreamscape-services/ai/ml/scripts/run_etl.py
- dreamscape-services/ai/ml/scripts/validate_dataset.py (new)
- dreamscape-services/db/seed_ml_realistic.sql (new)

Results:
- 1,409 train samples, 353 test samples
- 4.68% booking rate (realistic conversion)
- 6 user segments well distributed
- Dataset ready for Collaborative Filtering training

* Dr 415 us ia 008 pipeline d entrainement du modele ml (#85)

* feat(US-IA-008): Implement ML model training pipeline and data handling

- Added data_loader.py for loading user and item vectors, and user-item interactions from PostgreSQL.
- Introduced metrics.py for evaluation metrics including precision, recall, and AUC-ROC.
- Created model.py implementing a collaborative filtering model using SVD.
- Developed train_model.py to orchestrate the training pipeline, including data loading, model training, evaluation, and conditional model saving.
- Updated requirements.txt with necessary dependencies for ML operations.

This commit establishes the foundational components for the machine learning recommendation system.

* fix(ML): fix clip on DataFrame, MLflow metric names, and add pycache to gitignore

- data_loader.py: replace .clip() on full DataFrame with .assign(rating=lambda x: x["rating"].clip()) to avoid TypeError on string columns
- metrics.py: rename precision@k/recall@k/ndcg@k to precision_at_k/recall_at_k/ndcg_at_k (MLflow rejects '@' in metric names)
- train_model.py: update ndcg metric key lookup to match new naming
- requirements.txt: Python 3.13 compatible versions
- tests/test_pipeline.py: local end-to-end test with synthetic data
- .gitignore: add __pycache__, *.pyc, *.pyo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Add shared COIN across markets via CoinConfig + authority gating

- New CoinConfig PDA per coin_mint stores authority + receipt_program
- Mint authority PDA now derived from coin_mint (not slab), enabling
  multiple markets to share one COIN token
- init_coin_config (IX tag 3): validates mint authority/freeze, creates
  CoinConfig with DAO authority who can register new markets
- init_market_rewards: now requires CoinConfig.authority as signer,
  preventing unauthorized markets from inflating shared COIN supply
- receipt_program copied from CoinConfig into each MRC at init time
- Tests: init_coin_config (happy, double-init, wrong/no/freeze authority),
  wrong authority rejected, two-market shared COIN e2e,
  unauthorized market inflation prevented

commit.message:
Make cobblestone texture seamlessly tileable

Use toroidal Voronoi cell replication (3x3 grid of tile copies) so
stones at texture edges wrap correctly to the opposite side. Map all
toroidal copies back to base cell IDs for consistent per-stone hashing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Dockerfile claude binary, improve WSL error messages, fix show-details button (#62)

* Fix Windows onboarding: setup-token, WSL detection, show-details button

- Replace broken bundled claude binary with official installer in Dockerfile.
  The SDK-bundled binary was architecture-locked and lacked execute permission,
  causing `claude setup-token` to fail on Windows/x86_64.
- Add WSL-specific friendly error messages in onboarding (not installed,
  virtualization disabled, import failed, rootfs download, services timeout)
- Fix "show details" button submitting the form (missing type="button"),
  which restarted setup instead of showing error details
- Capture stderr from wsl --import and curl in windows.rs for diagnostics
- Fix silent catch swallowing agentStatus() errors
- Support multi-line error messages with white-space: pre-line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make bump.sh also run uv lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Bump version to 0.1.43

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: elyxlz <elyxlz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use npm install instead of npm ci for cross-platform compatibility

npm ci strictly follows the lockfile which only has macOS binaries.
npm install will fetch the correct platform-specific packages (pagefind).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
